title: Verbる くらいなら
titleEn: Expresses preference to avoid something: rather than..., if it comes to doing X, Id rather
explanation: Dùng để nói thà chọn điều khác còn hơn phải làm X. Mẫu này thể hiện người nói rất muốn tránh X. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + くらいなら.
explanationEn: This grammar is used when the speaker would rather not do something or chooses another option rather than face the stated action. It’s often translated as rather than... Id prefer... or if it comes down to doing X, Id rather
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる こと なし に
titleEn: Used to express without doing something
explanation: Dùng để diễn tả làm hoặc xảy ra điều phía sau mà không làm X. Sắc thái trang trọng hơn ないで. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + ことなしに.
explanationEn: Verbることなしに indicates doing something else without performing the stated action. It can imply skipping or omitting the verb action entirely
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる ことのないように
titleEn: Expresses the desire or effort to prevent something: so as not to..., to avoid
structure: Verb-dictionary form + ことのないように
structureEn: Verb-dictionary form + ことのないように
explanation: Dùng để nói cố gắng hoặc chú ý để tránh xảy ra X. Có thể hiểu là “để không...”. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + ことのないように.
explanationEn: Verbる ことのないように is used to show that one is trying or intending to prevent some action from happening. Its like so that this doesnt happen or in order not to
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる ときりがない
titleEn: Used to indicate that something can go on endlessly or without limits
structure: Verb-casual + と + きりがない
structureEn: Verb-casual + と + きりがない
explanation: Dùng để nói nếu bắt đầu làm, kể hoặc nghĩ về X thì sẽ không có điểm dừng. Cấu trúc: Verb-casual + と + きりがない.
explanationEn: The ～るときりがない grammar point is used to express that once you start doing the verb, there’s no end or limit. The phrase きりがない means no end or endless
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる ともなく Verb
titleEn: Used to express without a particular intention, unconsciously, or before one knows it
structure: Verb-dictionary form + ともなく + Verb
structureEn: Verb-dictionary form + ともなく + Verb
explanation: Dùng để nói làm X một cách vô thức, không có ý định rõ ràng, rồi dẫn đến hành động hoặc trạng thái phía sau. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + ともなく + Verb.
explanationEn: The phrase VerbるともなくVerb indicates doing something unintentionally or unconsciously— you just find yourself doing it without a clear aim or intention
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる ともなしに Verb
titleEn: Expresses doing something unintentionally or without conscious thought
structure: Verb-dictionary form + ともなしに + Verb
structureEn: Verb-dictionary form + ともなしに + Verb
explanation: Dùng để nói làm X một cách lơ đãng hoặc không chủ ý. Mẫu này thường dùng với các động từ như 見る, 聞く, 考える. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + ともなしに + Verb.
explanationEn: VerbるともなしにVerb is used to show that you do some action without particularly intending to. Often you ‘end up doing’ something by habit or casually
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる なり
titleEn: Expresses as soon as or the moment
explanation: Dùng để nói ngay khi làm X thì lập tức Y xảy ra. Mẫu này nhấn mạnh sự nối tiếp rất nhanh. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + なり.
explanationEn: Verbるなり indicates that the following action happens immediately after the verb action. It can be translated as no sooner than..., as soon as..., or the moment
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる にとどまらず～も
titleEn: Expresses not only... but also, not limited to
structure: Noun / Verb-dictionary form + にとどまらず + も/ほかのこと
structureEn: Noun / Verb-dictionary form + にとどまらず + も/ほかのこと
explanation: Dùng để nói phạm vi không chỉ dừng ở việc X mà còn mở rộng sang điều khác. Có thể hiểu là “không chỉ... mà còn...”. Cấu trúc: Noun / Verb-dictionary form + にとどまらず + も/ほかのこと.
explanationEn: にとどまらず is used to indicate that something goes beyond just the stated verb or noun. It can be translated as not just... but also... or not limited to
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる にはあたらない
titleEn: Used to say there is no need to..., it’s not necessary to
structure: Verb-dictionary form + にはあたらない
structureEn: Verb-dictionary form + にはあたらない
explanation: Dùng để nói không cần thiết phải làm X hoặc không đáng để làm X. Sắc thái trang trọng, thường dùng trong đánh giá. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + にはあたらない.
explanationEn: Verbる にはあたらない expresses that something is not worth the reaction or there is no need to do the verb. Its somewhat formal and often used in writing
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Verbる にも
titleEn: Indicates that doing the verb is impossible or difficult, even if one wants to
structure: Verb-dictionary form + にも + (reason it cant be done)
structureEn: Verb-dictionary form + にも + (reason it cant be done)
explanation: Dùng khi muốn làm X nhưng khó hoặc không thể vì một lý do nào đó. Thường đi với vế sau nêu trở ngại. Cấu trúc: Verb-dictionary form + にも + (reason it cant be done).
explanationEn: Verbる にも is often used with an additional clause explaining why the action can’t be done. It can be translated as even if (I) want to do X, I can’t (because...)
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)
